name: conpub
description: Agent Skill for publishing local Markdown and Typst knowledge to Confluence Cloud with conpub.

interface.shortDescription: Publish local knowledge files to Confluence Cloud.
interface.longDescription: Configure, query, preview, sync, and publish a local Markdown or Typst knowledge base through the conpub CLI.
defaultPrompt: Configure this project to publish local knowledge with conpub.
Preview and sync these local documents to Confluence.
Search the local knowledge base and publish the result.
